hooks.command: gapp_version=$(grep __version__ "${CLAUDE_PLUGIN_ROOT}/gapp/__init__.py" | cut -d'"' -f2); cached_version=$(cat "${CLAUDE_PLUGIN_DATA}/installed_version" 2>/dev/null); if [ "$gapp_version" != "$cached_version" ]; then cd "${CLAUDE_PLUGIN_ROOT}" && pip install -t "${CLAUDE_PLUGIN_DATA}/site-packages" -r requirements.txt && echo "$gapp_version" > "${CLAUDE_PLUGIN_DATA}/installed_version"; fi

input=$(cat); ref=$(echo "$input" | jq -r '.tool_input.ref // empty'); solution=$(echo "$input" | jq -r '.tool_input.solution // empty'); ref_arg=''; sol_arg=''; [ -n "$ref" ] && ref_arg="--ref $ref"; [ -n "$solution" ] && sol_arg="--solution $solution"; deploy_ref=$(gapp quick-deploy $ref_arg $sol_arg 2>&1 | tee /dev/stderr | tail -1); echo "$input" | jq --arg dr "$deploy_ref" '.tool_input.deploy_ref = $dr'
